insert.if:
INSERT INTO RCA.TB_AI_PERFORMACE_MST ( SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, DIRECTION, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME ) VALUES
( #{item.sysname}, #{item.port}, #{item.unit}, #{item.tmper}, #{item.direction}, #{item.rxcur}, #{item.rxmin}, #{item.rxmax}, #{item.rxave}, #{item.txcur}, #{item.txmin}, #{item.txmax}, #{item.txave}, #{item.ocrtime} )
